creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Tsurutani-san,

I was able to build devel/libgee without problems with japanese/sed
installed. It installs sed as /usr/local/bin/sed, while the ports use
/usr/bin/sed by default. Do you force it to use the sed installed by the
port in any way, e.g. via /etc/make.conf or via environment variables?

Currently, this looks like a problem local to your system to me, in which
case there wouldn't be any need to patch japanese/sed.

Best regards,
Stefan
